content.full_text:
Law Offices of Bravo, Francis & Margulies
100 Bush Street, Suite 925
San Francisco, CA 94104
Telephone 415.394.6300
Facsimile 415.394.0340

Joseph K. Bravo
Kelly Francis
Jeffrey E. Margulies
Franz Fuetsch

March 18, 1991

Ms. Susan Bobrow
Fair Political Practices Commission,
Legal Division
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Re: "NO ON B", FPPC ID NO. 901541

Dear Ms. Bobrow,

I write to confirm our conversation of last month wherein I sought clarification that leftover monies from the No on B campaign, may be lawfully transferred to the San Francisco Apartment Association, a sponsor of the "No on B" campaign. The San Francisco Apartment Association, a non-profit trade organization, seeks the "No on B" funds for the purpose of printing and distributing informational brochures promoting the rental housing industry. During our conversation you informed me that the proposed transfer is lawful.

If your recollection of our conversation is not as stated above, please contact me immediately.

Sincerely,

Joseph K. Bravo Esq.
BRAVO, FRANCIS & MARGULIES

cc: Tim Carrico
